parts.text:
The researcher has held the following administrative positions:
* Chief of the Department of Computer Science (2024 - Present)
* Vice-Chief of the Department of Computer Science (2018 - 2022)
* Program Coordinator (2009 - 2010)
* Program Coordinator (2006 - 2008)
* Program Coordinator (2002 - 2004)
* Program Coordinator (2000 - 2002)
